name: Over the Door Storage Rack with Mesh Baskets - Brightroom™: Metal Frame, Powder-Coated, Universal Storage, White
description:
Keep your home organized with the help of this Over-the-Door Storage Rack with Mesh Baskets from Brightroom™. Supported on a metal frame, this storage rack features six attached mesh caddies in different sizes to stash a variety of household essentials, while the open mesh caddies allow you to easily reach for the item you're looking for. Showcasing a sleek design, it can be easily hung by a hook from the back of your door to offer you a space-efficient storage option.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
